title: Handle SystemVerilog modport port renaming
body:
Latest code can't handle the below syntax:

```
modport Initiator
(
    input Clk,
    output Address,
    output .Dout(DInitiator), // ERROR: syntax error, unexpected '.', expecting TOK_ID
    input .Din(DTarget),
    output Access,
    output Write,
    input Ready,
    input DataReady
);
```

[See for example](https://verificationacademy.com/forums/uvm/change-name-outputs-modport-interface) but I'm not sure what this is called or where to find an official reference.
code_blocks:
modport Initiator
(
    input Clk,
    output Address,
    output .Dout(DInitiator), // ERROR: syntax error, unexpected '.', expecting TOK_ID
    input .Din(DTarget),
    output Access,
    output Write,
    input Ready,
    input DataReady
);
